name: Melisron Ltd.
summary: Melisron Ltd. operates as a real estate company in Israel. The company enhances, manages, maintains, and rents commercial and office spaces. It also owns and operates shopping malls and commercial centers, and real estate complexes for offices and high-tech industries. Melisron Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is based in Herzliya, Israel. Melisron Ltd. is a subsidiary of Ofer Investments Group.
